headlines.title: Supreme Court temporarily extends access to abortion pill while it mulls legal challenge
headlines.description: The justices are still considering what next steps to take in a case that could block availability of the abortion pill mifepristone by mail.

headlines.title: The cage match is on for tickets to Trump’s UFC fight at the White House
headlines.description: Some 4,000-plus spectators who are lucky enough, cunning enough or rich enough will score a seat to the UFC fight on the South Lawn next month.

headlines.title: Advocacy group sues Trump administration over effort to paint reflecting pool ‘American Flag Blue’
headlines.description: The Cultural Landscape Foundation seeks to block the ongoing repainting of the reflecting pool on the National Mall that Trump said will be “American Flag Blue.”

headlines.title: Virginia Democrats ask Supreme Court to allow use of new congressional map
headlines.description: The filing on Monday comes after the Virginia Supreme Court concluded that the process that led to a referendum approving the new congressional map was unlawful.

headlines.title: Hantavirus teaching us to ‘take appropriate precautions without freaking out’: former NIH official
headlines.description: NBC News correspondents Daniele Hamamdjian and Aaron Gilchrist report on passengers from the hantavirus-stricken cruise ship as they return to their home countries. Former NIAID Director Dr. Jeanne Marrazzo joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss the U.S. government’s response to the deadly virus.

headlines.title: Iran negotiations ‘deadlocked’ as Trump says ceasefire is ‘on life support’
headlines.description: President Trump warns the U.S. ceasefire with Iran is “on life support” after he rejected Iran’s response to his peace proposal. NBC News correspondents Jonathan Allen, Matt Bradley, Courtney Kube and Christine Romans discuss the diplomatic, political and economic fallout from the war.

headlines.title: Trump says ceasefire with Iran is 'on massive life support'
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters the Iranian response to a U.S. peace proposal was “stupid” and that the ceasefire is “on massive life support.” NBC News' Jon Allen reports on the war's impasse and how Trump responded to questions over his meeting with Chinese President Xi Jinping later in the week.

headlines.title: 'Ohio is back': Both parties navigate competitive midterm races in a forgotten battleground
headlines.description: Two hard facts hover over this year’s midterm races in Ohio.

headlines.title: How the White House Correspondents’ Association dinner chaos unfolded
headlines.description: Secret Service faced challenges evacuating President, Vice President, Cabinet officials and Congressional leaders after gunman rushes D.C. gala.

headlines.title: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy defends new reality show amid backlash
headlines.description: Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy is making a controversial road trip back to reality TV.“The Great American Road Trip,” a five-part reality series set to air on YouTube in celebration of the United States’ 250th anniversary, follows Duffy as he travels across the country with his wife, Fox News host Rachel Campos-Duffy, and their nine children.“The motto is: To love America is to see America,” Duffy says in the show’s trailer.

headlines.title: Trump says he would support suspending the federal gas tax
headlines.description: President Donald Trump told reporters on Monday that he would support temporarily suspending the federal gas tax “until it’s appropriate.”Suspending the federal gas tax, which currently sits at about 18 cents per gallon, would require congressional approval

headlines.title: Map: How much you pay in federal and state gas taxes
headlines.description: As national gas price averages head toward $5 per gallon, one state has already suspended its gas tax, and now President Donald Trump and his Cabinet are talking about doing the same.
